commands.review_summary:
The PR defers Canvas host, document resolver, CLI, and tool implementation imports from plugin registration to first use and adds an entrypoint test plus a shared tool schema module.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a startup performance refactor. The eager import cost is source-visible in current main, and the PR body supplies an after-fix benchmark run.
